boxy_tools.description: List Google Calendar events directly via Google. Prefer locally ingested Calendar queries unless the user explicitly asks for a live provider read.
boxy_tools.name: google_calendar.calendar_list_events

boxy_tools.description: List Google Chat messages directly via the Google Chat API. Provider page order follows Google defaults and is not reliable for recent/latest message summaries. Prefer locally ingested Chat message queries unless the user explicitly asks for a live provider read.
boxy_tools.name: google_chat.chat_list_messages

boxy_tools.description: List Google Chat spaces directly via the Google Chat API. Prefer locally ingested Chat space queries unless the user explicitly asks for a live provider read.
boxy_tools.name: google_chat.chat_list_spaces

boxy_tools.description: Send a Google Chat message to a space
boxy_tools.name: google_chat.chat_send_message

boxy_tools.description: Fetch Google Docs document structure directly via Google. Prefer locally ingested Docs queries unless the user explicitly asks for a live provider read.
boxy_tools.name: google_docs.docs_get_document

boxy_tools.description: Fetch Google Drive file metadata directly via Google. Prefer locally ingested Drive queries unless the user explicitly asks for a live provider read.
boxy_tools.name: google_drive.drive_get_file

boxy_tools.description: Search Google Drive files directly via Google. Prefer locally ingested Drive queries unless the user explicitly asks for a live provider read.
boxy_tools.name: google_drive.drive_search_files

boxy_tools.description: Fetch Gmail thread details via Google. Prefer local Gmail data queries when available; this is slower but may be slightly fresher.
boxy_tools.name: google_gmail.gmail_get_thread

boxy_tools.description: Search Gmail threads via Google. Prefer local Gmail data queries when available; this is slower but may be slightly fresher.
boxy_tools.name: google_gmail.gmail_search_threads

boxy_tools.description: Dispatch a single-line WeChat plain-text message (max 4096 chars). Requires idempotency_key for safe deduplication/replay; `status=sent` is dispatch-only (not delivery-confirmed), and `unknown_delivery` requires retry with a new idempotency key.

allow_cua_fallback.description: Accepted for compatibility but ignored in this MVP.
allow_cua_fallback.title: Allow Cua Fallback

display_id.description: Optional display id. Defaults to the connector display (typically 99).
display_id.title: Display Id

idempotency_key.description: Non-empty idempotency key for deduplication and safe replay.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

boxy_tools.name: wechat.send_message

boxy_tools.description: Send one WhatsApp text message via whatsapp-runtime. Uses idempotency_key as runtime clientMessageId and retries 409 conflicts using Retry-After.

idempotency_key.description: Non-empty idempotency key mapped to runtime clientMessageId for safe retries.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

target.description: Target phone or jid accepted by whatsapp-runtime /messages/send.
target.title: Target

boxy_tools.name: whatsapp.send_message

builtin_tools.description: Execute simple local Python computations in a constrained environment. No network access and no general stdlib/runtime access; use it for small local calculations and transformations only.
builtin_tools.name: python_exec

builtin_tools.description: Search the public web for internet information. Do not use for private connector or locally ingested user data.
builtin_tools.name: web_search

data_queries.description: Search Google Calendar events from locally ingested data. Prefer this over remote Calendar tools when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_calendar.search_events_local

data_queries.description: Fetch newest-first Google Chat messages for one space from locally ingested data. Prefer this over remote Chat reads for recent/latest message summaries when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_chat.get_space_messages_local

data_queries.description: Semantically search Google Chat transcript windows from locally ingested data. Prefer this when the user intent is topical or meaning-based rather than strict keyword matching.
data_queries.name: google_chat.search_messages_semantic_local

data_queries.description: List Google Chat conversations from locally ingested messages. Prefer this over remote Chat reads when local data is acceptable, including finding spaces before summarizing recent messages.
data_queries.name: google_chat.search_spaces_local

data_queries.description: Fetch one Google Docs document record with extracted body text from locally ingested changes. Prefer this over remote Docs reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_docs.get_document_local

data_queries.description: Search Google Docs metadata and extracted body text from locally ingested changes. Prefer this over remote Docs reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_docs.search_documents_local

data_queries.description: Fetch one Google Drive file from locally ingested change metadata. Prefer this over remote Drive reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_drive.get_file_local

data_queries.description: Search Google Drive files from locally ingested change metadata. Prefer this over remote Drive reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_drive.search_files_local

data_queries.description: Fetch a Gmail thread from locally ingested data. Prefer this over remote Gmail tools when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_gmail.get_thread_local

data_queries.description: Fetch multiple Gmail threads from locally ingested data in one call. Prefer this over repeated remote Gmail reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_gmail.get_threads_local

data_queries.description: Search Gmail threads from locally ingested data. Prefer this over remote Gmail tools when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_gmail.search_threads_local

data_queries.description: Fetch one Google Sheets spreadsheet record from locally ingested changes. Prefer this over remote Sheets metadata reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_sheets.get_spreadsheet_local

data_queries.description: Search Google Sheets metadata from locally ingested changes. Prefer this over remote Sheets metadata reads when local data is acceptable.
data_queries.name: google_sheets.search_spreadsheets_local

data_queries.description: Load WeChat message history for one conversation handle (account_id + contact_username).

account_id.description: Optional exact WeChat owner account id such as `wxid_owner`. Omit when unknown so the connector can resolve from local WeChat data. Do not pass login `session_id` values or unrelated app/session identifiers.
account_id.title: Account Id

argument_guidance.account_id: Optional exact WeChat owner account id such as `wxid_owner`. Omit when unknown. Do not pass login `session_id` values or unrelated opaque session identifiers.

argument_guidance.account_id: Optional exact WeChat owner account id such as `wxid_owner`. Omit when unknown. Do not pass login `session_id` values or unrelated opaque session identifiers.

data_queries.name: wechat.resolve_targets

argument_guidance.account_id: Optional exact WeChat owner account id such as `wxid_owner`. Omit when unknown. Do not pass login `session_id` values or unrelated opaque session identifiers.

data_queries.description: Search persisted WeChat message text across chats with stable seek pagination.

account_id.description: Optional exact WeChat owner account id such as `wxid_owner`. Omit when unknown so the connector can resolve from local WeChat data. Do not pass login `session_id` values or unrelated app/session identifiers.
